item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: A Funny Friday dump to end your work week (video heavy)
item.description:
Hey all, it's time for one of my Funny Friday dumps for a fun way to end the work week. If you can spare anything to help out an imgurian going through some tough times, feel free to do so at https://ko-fi.com/wanderingguy As always, bonus content that with more adult humor is linked to in the comments, so be sure to check that out. Enjoy the dump and I'll see you in the comments!
Definitely a better love story than Twilight.
All hail Attius, King of Corginia, uniter of the Cardigans and Pembrokes!
All the neighborhood dogs, but none of the neighbors.
This poor villager gets no sleep. Link keeps coming in every night to take his life's savings and then advance to the next day to do it again.
Never cross Grandma when it comes to food. After all, she is the one that cooks.
The Roads lead to all Romes?
Hope you're having a great Friday and it's the start of a good weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: Fem!Batfleck Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJay here, sharing my newest cosplay— a female version of Ben Affleck’s Batman.
The suit, gauntlets, cape, and cowl (not pictured) were all crafted by jcurtis_atelier.
I’m super in love with this look. The muscle suit makes this thing a sauna, but it’s awesome IMO.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
doesn't look like the box will close properly
yep that's airlines alright
i love taco bell
kind of hard to pull the trigger
Requiem for a Dream - what a fucked up movie
best feeling
thanks for putting up with all the dumb stuff i repost
this kid is going places
mmm hmm
i have questions
as is tradition
i can't look at that for more than millisecond
this should not make sense but it does
not really
are we sure that's a man?
must've been power sliding
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I'm Allergic To Everything
item.description: Caroline Cray is “allergic to everything”. Diagnosed with MCAS, or mast cell activation syndrome, Cray’s diet is limited to two foods – oatmeal and hypoallergenic formula – to prevent her from going into anaphylactic shock. Cray is working to raise awareness for the syndrome, so that newly diagnosed people won’t have to go through the uncertainty that she did.
item.dc:creator: 60SecondDocs

item.title: It’s this type of all in commitment that we need.
item.dc:creator: Thewulasvegas

item.title: Thanks for your continued support Imgur!
item.description: Any time I have shared my original music with people I know, they typically don't respond, or don't really care. I guess it is sort of a big ask, like "listen to this thing I poured my heart and soul into and then pretend it's cool" sort of thing. Sometimes it isn't people's taste, or they don't want to hurt your feelings, or they don't really care as much as you think they did, or as much as you care about it. It is nice to have an outlet on Imgur that I can put things out to. I don't make any money off it, I am not looking for fame or fortune, I just like sharing what I create with people, and Imgurians have been awesome in providing constructive feedback, following my work, and so on. So, to all of you, thanks for your continued support ! Here is the latest release: https://youtu.be/mRtVMD4Gyrg?si=y1hFuAYRZ-J-iB2k
item.dc:creator: FromTheBeyond
